name: Green Lentil Rissoles with Vegan Yogurt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. RISSOLES: Combine lentils and water; bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender (I think it needs closer to an hour to get them really tender). Add more water if necessary.
2. Heat margarine, add onion and cook for a couple of minutes.
3. Add carrot and pepper; cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Add spices, tomato paste, salt and pepper. Mix together well and stir in the lentils. Add parsley. Allow to cool until it is cool enough to handle.
5. Divide the mixture into 12 portions and shape into patties. Coat them with flour, dip in oil and coat with breadcrumbs and oats (omit this step).
6. Shallow fry in hot oil until the patties are golden brown on both sides. Drain well and serve with the sauce.
7. SAUCE: Combine all ingredients together and chill.
